events.title: v0.22.0
events.description:
# Kira v0.22.0 Release Candidate

**Prepared:** 2026-03-29  
**Baseline:** [v0.21.0](../../.git/refs/tags/v0.21.0)  
**Audience:** Product, sales, solutions, engineering, and operations

## Executive Summary

This release candidate moves Kira from an authentication-hardening cycle into a
launch-readiness, voice-platform expansion, and agent-runtime modernization
cycle.

The biggest customer-facing shift is that Kira now supports a broader and more
competitive voice stack for live AI agents:

- G...
highlights: Gemini gemini-3.1-flash-live-preview
Grok Voice with grok-4-1
OpenAI Realtime gpt-realtime-1.5
OpenAI Realtime gpt-realtime-mini-2025-12-15
Custom Azure pipeline: Microsoft Omni HD + Azure OpenAI gpt-5.4-nano

events.title: v0.21.0 — Enterprise Authentication & Security Overhaul
events.description:
## Highlights

### Secure, Enterprise-Grade Login with WorkOS AuthKit
Replaced the custom login flow with WorkOS AuthKit Hosted UI. Users now sign in through a professionally-hosted authentication page supporting email + password, magic link, SSO, and MFA — all managed through the WorkOS dashboard.

### Centralized Secrets Management with WorkOS Vault
API keys, third-party credentials, and integration secrets are now stored in WorkOS Vault. Every tenant gets encrypted, auditable secret storage w...
highlights: WorkOS AuthKit Hosted UI — SSO, magic auth, and org selection handled by WorkOS
WorkOS Vault — Secure secret registry for tenant credentials and API keys
WorkOS Pipes — Connected account platform for third-party integrations
WorkOS Audit Events — Audit logging through WorkOS for unified compliance trails
Embedded Account Widgets — Profile, security, team management, and API keys powered by WorkOS widgets in Settings

events.title: v0.20.0 - Stronger access controls and smoother widget experience
events.description:
This release improves how teams manage access, support operations, and customer-facing widget experiences across Kira.

Highlights
- Stronger access controls and tenant-aware permissions for safer operations across teams
- Improved support operator login and support mode feedback for internal workflows
- Better widget setup experience with a cleaner agent selector and easier preview options
- New hosted widget preview pages for desktop and mobile, making customer-site testing simpler and more re...
highlights: Stronger access controls and tenant-aware permissions for safer operations across teams
Improved support operator login and support mode feedback for internal workflows
Better widget setup experience with a cleaner agent selector and easier preview options
New hosted widget preview pages for desktop and mobile, making customer-site testing simpler and more reliable
More polished navigation with nested, collapsible sidebar sections

events.title: v0.19.0 — Enterprise Onboarding and Tenant Identity Controls
events.description:
## What's New

### Simpler Enterprise Onboarding

New tenants can now go live faster with a WorkOS-powered onboarding flow that starts with secure email sign-in and transitions to SSO when the customer admin is ready.

**What this means for customers:**
- New tenants no longer need SSO configured on day one to get started
- Users can sign in with a company email on the tenant's approved domain
- Once IT completes setup, the tenant can move to SSO through the self-service admin flow

### Stronger...
highlights: New tenants no longer need SSO configured on day one to get started
Users can sign in with a company email on the tenant's approved domain
Once IT completes setup, the tenant can move to SSO through the self-service admin flow
Canonical tenant records now align title, domain, and WorkOS organization mapping
Domain verification can be initiated from the Settings experience through the WorkOS admin portal

events.title: v0.18.0 — Live Knowledge: Web Search with Citations
events.description:
## What's New

### Live Knowledge — Real-Time Web Search

Agents can now search approved websites in real time to answer customer questions with up-to-date information and source citations.

**How it works:**
- Configure a list of approved domains per agent (e.g., `geneco.sg`, `get.geneco.sg`)
- When a customer asks a question, the agent searches those websites live and includes the information in its response
- Every answer includes clickable source links so customers can verify information the...
highlights: Configure a list of approved domains per agent (e.g., geneco.sg, get.geneco.sg)
When a customer asks a question, the agent searches those websites live and includes the information in its response
Every answer includes clickable source links so customers can verify information themselves
The agent can only search domains you approve — it never accesses the open web
Answer questions about current promotions, pricing, and plans from your website

events.title: v0.17.0
events.description:
## What's New

### Holiday Calendar — Multi-Country Support
- **10 countries supported out of the box**: Singapore, United States, Brazil, Australia, Malaysia, Philippines, Japan, South Korea, Taiwan, and China — each with their full public holiday calendar
- **One-click import**: Select a country and import all public holidays for the year instantly, including moveable holidays like Lunar New Year, Hari Raya, Easter, and Thanksgiving
- **Country flag icons**: Visual flag indicators throughout t...
highlights: Country flag icons: Visual flag indicators throughout the calendar UI make it easy to identify and filter holidays by country at a glance
CLI support: Manage holidays from the command line with kira holidays — list, create, delete, check dates, and bulk-import by country
Resolved critical security findings in FHIR, MCP, and EHR configuration handling
Addressed medium-severity code review items across the platform
Cleaned up TypeScript type-checking surfaces for improved build reliability

events.title: v0.16.0
events.description:
## What's New

### Geneco PoC — Live Customer Support Integration
- **CRM-connected chat widget**: The Geneco customer-facing widget can now look up account balances and raise support cases directly in Dynamics CRM, with no agent involvement required for routine inquiries
- **Two-agent setup**: A public-facing support agent (chat) and an internal agent (voice) share the same CRM connection but with separate permission scopes — internal agents have full case visibility including listing and retri...
highlights: Inbox routing UI: Supervisors can now configure how incoming conversations are routed to queues and agents through a dedicated settings screen
Agent status picker: Agents can set their availability status (Online, Busy, Away, Offline) directly from the sidebar
The widget is now draggable — teams can reposition it anywhere on screen to suit their workflow
Once moved manually, the auto-slide behaviour disables so the widget stays where it was placed
All pages in the app now have bookmarkable URLs (e.g. /settings/inbox-routing, /brands/new, /brands/:id)

events.title: v0.15.0 — Geneco PoC Livechat MCP + Platform Admin
events.description:

### Geneco Live Chat PoC

### Platform Administration

### Fixes
- Widget settings CLI tenant path resolution
- MCP auth token handling

---
**Full changelog:** [`v0.14.0...v0.15.0`](https://github.c...
highlights: Widget default agent binding and signed widget context
MCP server integration for Geneco CRM (Dynamics 365)
Widget settings CLI for PoC tenant setup and MCP auth configuration
Super-admin tenant management UI and API
Tenant provisioning, configuration, and lifecycle controls

events.title: v0.14.0 — FHIR R4 Healthcare Scheduling via Medplum + Epic
events.description:
Healthcare appointment scheduling via a clean FHIR R4 interface backed by Medplum, with optional Epic STU3 proxy for production EMR write-back.

## Why This Feature Exists

Healthcare is one of the highest-value verticals for AI-assisted engagement. Patients routinely contact providers to book, reschedule, or ask about appointments — interactions that today require a human agent or a fragmented self-service portal. This release makes Kira a first-class participant in that workflow.

**The core p...
highlights: POST /v1/fhir/Appointment/$find — search available slots (R4 in, R4 Bundle out)
POST /v1/fhir/Appointment/$book — book a slot (R4 in, booked R4 Appointment out)
GET /v1/fhir/metadata — custom CapabilityStatement advertising Epic proxy support
Epic STU3 proxy: R4↔STU3 field mapping (reasonCode→reason, basedOn→incomingReferral, comment field)
FNV-1a idempotency key on $book; duplicate requests return existing appointment

events.title: v0.13.0 - Livechat Widget Demo Readiness
events.description:
Major release completing the customer-facing livechat widget with full demo readiness, canonical module unification, and platform hardening across 22 project items.

### Livechat Widget
- Typing indicator with 30s auto-timeout via WebSocket events
- Message delivery status (sending/sent/failed) with retry button
- Email validation — client-side and server-side with inline errors
- Read receipts sent via WebSocket `mark_read` on incoming messages
- Persistent visitor identity — localStorage + coo...
highlights: Typing indicator with 30s auto-timeout via WebSocket events
Message delivery status (sending/sent/failed) with retry button
Email validation — client-side and server-side with inline errors
Read receipts sent via WebSocket mark_read on incoming messages
Persistent visitor identity — localStorage + cookie fallback (1yr)

events.title: v0.12.0 — AI-Native Livechat & Voice Pipeline Maturity
events.description:

## Features

### Livechat (NEW)
- AI-native seats, team inboxes, saved views, mentions, spam filtering
-...
highlights: AI-Native Livechat: Full contact center with AI seats, approvals, learning memory, and PTC baseline
Voice Pipeline Hardening: 100+ fixes across barge-in, audio quality, latency, and provider failover
Arena Voice Testing: CLI-driven voice testing with persona simulation
LLM Benchmark: Built-in TTFB benchmarking, all agents on Grok 4.1 Fast NR (666ms avg)

events.title: v0.11.0
events.description:
## v0.11.0: Campaign dry-run, provider validation registry, voice quality hardening

**46 commits** | **134 files changed** | **+14,169 / -3,071 lines**

Incremental release focused on campaign validation, telephony provider abstraction, and voice pipeline stability.

### Features
- **Campaign dry-run validation** — server-side pre-launch checks (agent config, DNC, phone numbers, dispositions) with CLI `kira campaigns validate`
- **Campaign audience management** — Overview & Audience tabs in UI,...
highlights: Campaign dry-run validation — server-side pre-launch checks (agent config, DNC, phone numbers, dispositions) with CLI kira campaigns validate
Campaign audience management — Overview & Audience tabs in UI, audience CRUD, dispositions CLI
Telephony provider validation registry — pluggable validators for Telnyx, Twilio, Vonage, and SIP providers
Per-tenant Telnyx credentials — campaign contacts now carry tenant-scoped telephony credentials
PATCH endpoints — update commands for campaigns & workflows via CLI and API

events.title: v0.10.0 - Provider AMD, Export Templates, SIP Trunk & Campaign Enhancements
events.description:
# Kira v0.10.0 Release Notes

**314 commits since v0.9.0** — focused on production-readiness for voice calls, campaign compliance, and platform extensibility.

---

## 1. Voice Pipeline

- **Provider-level AMD**: Answering machine detection at the telephony layer (~3s detection vs 5–10s transcript-based), with automatic voicemail disposition.
- **Echo suppression overhaul**: Generation-counter gating, active-source tracking, and transcript echo filtering eliminate self-talk loops across all code...
highlights: Greeting prewarm: Pre-generates the first LLM response during greeting playback, cutting perceived latency on call connect.
Inbound call handling: Full inbound Telnyx path with WebSocket media bridging, barge-in detection, and dead-air circuit breaker.
Phone number enforcement: Campaigns now require an allocated phone number before launch; the wizard validates number availability per channel.
Callback cadence & holiday blocking: Durable timers (via Temporal) honour configurable retry windows and regional holiday calendars.
Contact template variables: Audience records are interpolated into prompts and greeting text at dial time.

events.title: v0.9.0 - Vertical Modules, SDOH Screening & Dynamic Voice Tools
events.description:
## What's New in v0.9.0

### Omni-Channel Platform
Connect with customers across 12 messaging channels from a single interface. Each channel has a unified adapter with setup wizard, OAuth flows, health monitoring, and webhook routing.

**Channels:** WhatsApp Business, Telegram, Slack, Microsoft Teams, WeChat, Facebook Messenger, Instagram Direct, LINE, Viber, Discord, SMS (Twilio), Email (Resend)

### Unified Agent Builder
Agent Builder, Voice Agents, and Voice AI consolidated into one builder w...
highlights: Dual-stack telephony: SIP (Janus Gateway on Cloudflare Containers, B3Networks bridge) and Telnyx with audio recording to R2
xAI Grok as default LLM with intelligent model routing
Minimax TTS with per-agent and per-tenant voice configuration
Dynamic tool dispatch: voice agents now use their own tool definitions instead of hardcoded lead capture tools
Call Logs page with unified SIP + Telnyx query and recording playback

events.title: v0.8.0 - Call Script Optimizer
events.description:
## Call Script Optimizer

Major release introducing an AI-powered system for continuously optimizing sales call scripts through evolutionary algorithms, A/B testing, and multi-armed bandits.

### Highlights

- **Script Genome** - Structured script representation with modular components (opening, hook, discovery, CTA, objections, end)
- **Variant Generation** - AI-powered micro-mutations with change tracking and lineage
- **Guardrails Pipeline** - Deterministic checks + LLM judge + simulation reg...
highlights: Script Genome - Structured script representation with modular components (opening, hook, discovery, CTA, objections, end)
Variant Generation - AI-powered micro-mutations with change tracking and lineage
Guardrails Pipeline - Deterministic checks + LLM judge + simulation regression
A/B Testing - Fixed-split experiments with holdout groups and statistical analysis
Bandit Algorithms - Thompson sampling for continuous optimization

events.title: v0.6.0 - Campaign Wizard & Contact Management Redesign
events.description:

This release introduces a comprehensive **Campaign Creation Wizard** and a completely redesigned **Contact Management** experience with DISC profiling support.

## New Features

### Campaign Creation Wizard
- Multi-step wizard with 3-step flow: Basic Info → Scheduling → Compliance
- **Audience Selector** with tag-based filtering and file upload support
- **Template Preview** for voice, email, and WhatsApp channels
- **Schedule Preview** with calendar visualization
- **Auto-save** ...
highlights: Multi-step wizard with 3-step flow: Basic Info → Scheduling → Compliance
Audience Selector with tag-based filtering and file upload support
Template Preview for voice, email, and WhatsApp channels
Schedule Preview with calendar visualization
Auto-save drafts with recovery banner

events.title: v0.5.0 - MCP Server Store & Agent Integration
events.description:
# MCP Server Store & Agent Integration

This release introduces full MCP (Model Context Protocol) support, enabling agents to connect to external services through a standardized protocol. Inspired by [Salesforce's MCP announcement](https://developer.salesforce.com/blogs/2025/06/introducing-mcp-support-across-salesforce).

## ✨ New Features

### MCP Server Store
- **Marketplace UI**: Browse and install MCP servers from a curated store
- **Category Navigation**: Organized by CRM, DevOps, Integrati...
highlights: Marketplace UI: Browse and install MCP servers from a curated store
Category Navigation: Organized by CRM, DevOps, Integration, Communication, Productivity, Storage, AI, Analytics
One-Click Install: Install servers with credential configuration
Health Monitoring: Real-time health status for all installed servers
Salesforce DX - Salesforce CLI and development tools

events.title: v0.4.0 - Testing, OpenAPI & Security
events.description:
## Highlights

This release adds comprehensive test coverage, API schema validation, and critical security fixes.

## 🧪 Testing Infrastructure

- Added **Vitest** with React Testing Library
- **56 new test files** covering frontend components and API routes
- Test utilities: setup, factories, and API mocks
- Coverage thresholds enforced at 60%

```bash
bun run test           # Run all tests
bun run test:watch     # Watch mode
bun run test:coverage  # Coverage report
bun run test:...
highlights: Added Vitest with React Testing Library
56 new test files covering frontend components and API routes
Test utilities: setup, factories, and API mocks
Coverage thresholds enforced at 60%
Added OpenAPI/Zod schemas to all API routes for request/response validation
